subcodes.first_line: O Haydar! Hearken unto the melody of this songbird, warbling upon every branch, and be not of them that tarry. Say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حیدر اسمع ندآء هذه الطیر المغنی علی کل الافنان و لاتکن من الصابرین قل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @station of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @personal instructions
